title: Notices of monetary penalty and costs recovery: QFI
body: "On 1 October 2024, Ofqual issued  Qualifications for Industry (QFI) with a notice requiring it to pay a fine of £50,000. The Notice of Intention was published on 8 October.  QFI submitted representations to Ofqual, which were considered by Ofqual’s Enforcement Panel on 6 December 2024.  Following consideration of those representations, the Panel confirmed its provisional decisions and has imposed a monetary penalty in the sum of £50,000.  The Panel considered the costs incurred by Ofqual in relation to the decision to impose a Monetary Penalty on QFI and has decided that QFI should be required to pay Ofqual’s Costs in the sum of £15,846.22. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
